历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3743 → 5389 → 6188 → 10069 → 9830, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6000 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 9830, slightly higher than 2024 but still at a high level; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 33 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34, a small expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, an increase of about 3%, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 57th in 2026, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to a nationally renowned top financial institution; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity total ranking 91st, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a mid-level; no abnormal application records historically, indicating relatively stable application psychology; Applied Economics (A), Business Administration (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), all at A- or above, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, and Foreign Languages and Literature, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Finance/Economics/Economic majors was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', overall stable but differentiated; Electronics/Communication majors were 'highly recommended', with new engineering directions such as Data Science and Artificial Intelligence continuing to rise in popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, further intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment; Hunan Province is not its home province, so there is no local advantage, and competition mainly depends on national reputation and major attractiveness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a significant increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (+8.4%), and only a slight expansion of 1 person in the enrollment plan, the supply-demand relationship is tightening. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 9830; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10059, with a range of 9559–10559.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 756 → 897 → 862 → 1242 → 1242. It remained stable in the 800–900 range from 2021 to 2023, then significantly shifted back to 1242 in 2024, and remained unchanged in 2025. Over the past two years, the cumulative shift backward is about 380 places, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 1242. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 23 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 25 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 26, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions, highly recognized by liberal arts candidates. No significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation. Overall Douyin popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average'. No abnormal historical admission records for this university, indicating stable application psychology. Applied Economics (A), Business Administration (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), which highly match the majors enrolled in History Category such as Finance, Business Administration, and Foreign Languages and Literature, demonstrating outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Finance/Economics/Economic categories showed 'differentiated wait-and-see', Law showed 'differentiated wait-and-see', overall stable. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in this province is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% compared to 142,547 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch was 446 in 2025 and 438 in 2024, slightly rising. The university is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment. Hunan Province is not the home province, so there is no local preference, and applications mainly rely on the university's national brand effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in History Category candidates in 2026 (+31.2%), and the enrollment plan only slightly expanding by 1 student, the supply-demand relationship is clearly tightening. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 1242. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1302, with a range of 1067–1537.
